title: elfutils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.193-1]
- Upgrade to upstream elfutils 0.193
- Drop upstreamed patches
  elfutils-0.192-fix-free.patch
  elfutils-0.192-libelf-static.patch
  elfutils-0.192-stacktrace-lto.patch
full_text:
[0.193-1]
- Upgrade to upstream elfutils 0.193
- Drop upstreamed patches
  elfutils-0.192-fix-free.patch
  elfutils-0.192-libelf-static.patch
  elfutils-0.192-stacktrace-lto.patch

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20541-0.html
